opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My scalp is on fire and I can't stop scratching it until it bleeds. I used a new shampoo and I'm terrified my hair will fall out from infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared badly over the last day after a new shampoo and I'm scared it's infected.

symptom_narrative.character: burning, intense itch, silvery scaly plaques, bleeding spots from scratching
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: front hairline and a bit onto the forehead
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: pinpoint bleeding crusts from scratching; no fever; no pus; no facial swelling

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: chronic scaly scalp (thought to be dandruff)

family_history_as_reported.narrative: a relative has an autoimmune skin condition

objective_data_offered.value: well-defined red plaques with thick silvery scale along the front hairline onto the forehead; a few pinpoint bleeding crusts from scratching; no thick yellow (honey) crusts, no pus, no spreading hot redness
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot palpate warmth/induration or lymph nodes remotely
